# Extracao: Account KPIs Dashboard Ecom - ZASR DIGITAL by Depesh Mandalia

---

## Aba: PLEASE MAKE A COPY OF THIS SHEE

| This sheet is SUPER simple to setup but super powerful for insights.

1) create the same columns in Ads Manager as you see in the Raw Data tab. Account Name will be brought in automatically but ensure you include the start date
2) make a copy of this sheet File > Make a Copy
3) download your Ads Manager data into a CSV file (Reports > Export)
4) open the CSV file and ensure the columns match what's in Raw Data in this sheet (your copy of it). If it doesn't match it will break the formulas
5) copy and paste your CSV data into the Raw Data tab (tip, make a copy of the Raw Data tab before hand just in case something goes wrong!)

The support video for this is located in the training portal if you've purchased the course. This file is otherwise provided as-is for your pleasure. Over time as you get used to the sheet and how it works feel free to adapt and improve it!

You can automate steps 1-5 above using Supermetrics. If interested, sign up here and follow their instructions to create an automatic link from Facebook to Google Sheets: https://affiliate.supermetrics.com/1313.html (includes 10% discount when using that link) |
